series_metadata.series_description: Rate reports and write-ups used to calculate premium rates for Private Employers (PA), Public Employer Taxing Districts (PEC), and Self-Insured Assessment Rates. These reports are created by the actuarial section underwriters documenting the rate process review and the detailed information for the rating process.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain the machine readable versions of the Actuarial Rate Reports for 25 years. Then destroy the machine readable Actuarial Rate Reports. The electronic information is contained in access databases and excel spreadsheets saved on the I drive. The machine readable information of the Actuarial Rate Reports will be reviewed every 3 years to ensure that the files can still be accessed. ; Paper: Retain the Actuarial Rate Reports in the Actuarial Unit for 25 years. Then destroy the Actuarial Rate Reports., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
